reviews.review_description:
it's a simple yet challenging game.
it would be great if the developers could implement a top 10 global leaderboard and also to be able to input your name when having a highscore.
Also in a future update,maybe it would be possible to increase size of the box but only slightly,but if none of these ideas won't come into the game,that's ok.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review, glad to hear you're enjoying Capsule Critters!

Global Leaderboards is for sure something we're interested in adding at some point. We're hoping to do some smaller updates this year, and I'll pass your feedback along to the dev team.
